response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The reference JSON lyrics were not utilized because the segment ends before the song vocals begin. 2. JSON Usage: The merchandise announcement was fully manually transcribed and translated across English, Japanese, and Indonesian. 3. Timing & Pacing: Strictly synchronized timestamps to capture Kobo's rapid, expressive speech. Included a visual text event for the song title card at the end.
